name: *Star
author: Ea Ea / Craige Schensted (c. 2004, Kadon Enterprises) / AGP port
description: Ea Ea's (Craige Schensted's) acclaimed later connection-scoring game, on the five-sided *STAR board: 5 sectors of 10 rings around a central star-shaped bridge, 275 cells with 50 edge cells and 5 corner points. You never play the bridge but both players connect through it. White first; place a stone (or pass); two passes end the game. A 'star' is a connected group holding 2+ edge cells; it owns the edge cells it contains plus those it surrounds. Score = edge cells owned, +1 for owning 3+ corners, then an award of twice the star-count difference favouring the player with FEWER stars. The combined score is always 51 -- odd, so the game is drawless. Double *Star option: place two stones per turn (one on the first move).
